rulings.Case Title: COCOA DEVELOPMENT ASSOCIATES, LLP, A DELAWARE VS. ELEGANT ILLUSIONS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 8, 2007, LINE 14. DEFENDANT ELEGANT ILLUSIONS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE TERMS OF THE LEASE DO NOT CONSTITUTE A WAIVER OF THE THREE-DAY NOTICE REQUIREMENT. THE JULY 7 NOTICE DOES NOT MEET THE REQUIREMENT OF C.C.P. SECTION 1161. THE NOVEMBER 8 NOTICE DOES, BUT IT WAS GIVEN AFTER THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT WAS FILED. FACTS SUBSEQUENT TO THE COMMENCEMENT OF THIS ACTION MAY NOT BE PLED BY AMENDMENT OR IN A SUPPLEMENTAL COMPLAINT. =(302/PJM/AP)
